sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80994" key="pera/w2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree">*<orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περάω</orth> (B), <sense id="n80994.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πέρνημι</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περβέβαται</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">περιβαίνω</ref> </xr> III.</sense> </entryFree>
